ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "time_utc" TEXT /* Time of the operation in UTC */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who performed the operation */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used in the operation */,
  "product" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., TAKEOFF, LANDING) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the operation (e.g., airport, hospital) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the operation */,
  "emergency_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency (e.g., medical, trauma) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the operator */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the operator */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the operator was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "reg" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger or cargo capacity of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who performed the maintenance */,
  "inspection_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft that was refueled */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation associated with the refueling */,
  "fuel_amount" REAL /* Amount of fuel in liters */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Jet A1, AVGAS) */,
  "refueling_date" TEXT /* Date when the aircraft was refueled */,
  "fuel_cost" REAL /* Cost of the fuel */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the fuel vendor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fueling activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_records_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, maintenance, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergencies" (
  "emergency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency */,
  "emergency_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency (e.g., medical, trauma) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the emergency */,
  "date_time_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the emergency in UTC */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the emergency (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emergency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance schedule (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was performed */,
  "inspector" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the inspection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)
